payload.title: ADR: multi-tenant auth & identity model
payload.description: Write docs/adr capturing: OIDC + per-user API keys, JWT/refresh sessions, project-as-tenant boundary, LAN mTLS retained as a separate local trust domain, and the on-behalf-of attribution authz rule. Record rejected alternatives (per-agent identities; unifying mTLS with cloud auth; trusting the workspace header). (From SCP-122.)
